title: 日本ダービーの後に・天命砕きて至るは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Enduring tough competition from Sakura Chiyono
O, Yaeno Muteki, and many others, Mejiro Ardan
ultimately surpasses her own limits and claims
absolute victory at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Mejiro Ardan basks in the glory of victory,
it suddenly strikes her that she had forgotten
about her original goal of outshining her older
sister, and this brings her to a realization.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She learns that racing with her heart and soul
against her cherished rivals, Sakura Chiyono O
and Yaeno Muteki, is the way to make her
running shine even brighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While expressing the utmost gratitude to her
rivals, who have elevated her to greater heights,
Mejiro Ardan steps into a new world of
possibilities!
